channel.title: Gitlab on 天晴小猪
channel.description: Recent content in Gitlab on 天晴小猪

item.title: 安装GitLab
item.description: 更新yum源 备份原有的yum源 1 [root@vm yum.repos.d]# mv CentOS-Base.repo CentOS-Base.repo.bak_20180611 拷贝到目录下 1 [root@vm yum.repos.d]# mv /opt/program/Centos-7.repo ./CentOS-Base.repo 删除原有yum缓存 1 2 3 4 5 6 [root@vm yum.repos.d]# yum clean all 已加载插件：fastestmirr
